title: n8n Starter Guide for Zapier Users
description: A practical guide helping Zapier/Make.com users transition to n8n by mapping their existing knowledge to n8n concepts and showing what core features to learn first before taking on client projects.
gumroad_description:
You already know how to build automations — you just don't know where n8n hides everything yet.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Zapier or Make.com users who landed an n8n client project and don't want to fake their way through it
— Freelancers moving to n8n to escape per-task pricing and keep more margin
— Automation builders who've opened n8n, felt lost, and closed the tab

WHAT'S INSIDE

— A direct concept map: Zaps and Scenarios translated into n8n language so nothing feels foreign
— A prioritized list of features to learn first, so you're not wasting time on edge cases before you're billable
— A quick-reference summary you'll actually keep open while you build
— Honest notes on where n8n behaves differently, so you don't get blindsided mid-project

This won't make you an n8n expert overnight — it'll make sure you're not starting from zero when you don't have time to.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
